candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line, but there is no selected COGS parent bucket to augment because COGS final_choice is empty. Adding it to COGS would be unsupported and risks misclassification.
D&A component row appears in the operating section, but nothing ties it specifically to a selected COGS bucket, and no COGS row was selected earlier.

candidates.why: Operating amortization component, but not specifically linked to COGS and no COGS reference bucket exists.

variables.notes: COGS final_choice from the earlier mapping is empty, and the excerpt shows no clear cost-of-sales bucket. Therefore no D&A row should be added separately to COGS.

candidates.why: This is the cleanest explicit operating D&A summary row. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket consists of Other external costs, Personnel costs, and Other operatings expenses; this D&A line appears as a separate same-level operating line rather than a sub-component of those selected rows, so it should be added separately if using a summary row.
This is a component of operating D&A visible in some periods. It should only be used if no suitable summary row is available, because choosing both summary and components would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands Patents Trademarks Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization component row in the operating section. It looks like a component beneath broader D&A disclosure, so it is inferior to the summary row for final selection.
Amortization component row in the operating section. It appears more granular than the summary D&A line and should not be selected together with a summary.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Operating depreciation component outside the shortlist. It is still a D&A subcomponent and should not be added if a broader D&A summary row is selected.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are overhead buckets that do not themselves appear to include a separate D&A line item. An explicit operating D&A row exists alongside them above operating profit, so D&A should be added separately to XSGA. Per the summary-vs-components rule, only the summary row 'Depreciation & Amortization' is chosen, not the more granular depreciation/amortization component rows. Rows containing impairment were excluded because impairment is out of scope for this task.
